---
title: "Blog"
title-block-style: none
description: "Insights, tutorials, and updates from the chen.ist team on cybersecurity, software development, and cloud infrastructure."
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  include:
    lang-code: en
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  feed: true
  grid-columns: 3
page-layout: custom
site-url: https://chen.ist
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="blog-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Our <span class="gr">Blog</span></h1>
    <p>Cybersecurity insights, open-source guides, and infrastructure deep dives from our team.</p>
    <div class="blog-bar">
      <div class="blog-lang-switch">
        <a href="/blog.html" class="active">EN</a>
        <a href="/ro/blog.html">RO</a>
        <a href="/sv/blogg.html">SV</a>
        <a href="/de/blog.html">DE</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="blog-featured">
  <a href="/blog/open-source-europe-nextcloud-libreoffice.html" class="blog-featured-card" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
    <div class="blog-featured-img">
      <img src="/assets/images/stock/cloud-sky.webp" alt="Open Source in Europe" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="blog-featured-tag"><i class="bi bi-star-fill" style="font-size:0.6rem;"></i> Latest</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-title">Open-Source in Europe: How Nextcloud and LibreOffice Are Replacing Proprietary Software</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-desc">Real case studies of European governments adopting open-source. Germany's Bundescloud, France's digital strategy, Italy's 150,000 workstation migration, and what it means for your business.</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-meta">
        <span><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 26, 2026</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-tag"></i> Open Source, Europe, Digital Sovereignty</span>
      </div>
      <span class="blog-featured-link">Read article</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<div style="max-width:1200px; margin:2rem auto 0; padding:0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding-bottom:0.75rem;">
    <span style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#86868b;">All Articles</span>
    <a href="/blog.xml" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; color:#f26522; text-decoration:none;"><i class="bi bi-rss"></i> RSS</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

::: {.container style="margin-bottom:3rem;"}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- Newsletter signup -->
<div style="max-width:900px; margin:2rem auto; padding:2rem;">
  <div style="background:rgba(129,189,74,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2rem 2.5rem; text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:1.15rem; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Get cybersecurity insights delivered to your inbox</div>
    <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST" class="m-form" style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:1rem;">
      <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="newsletter-signup">
      <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@company.com" required style="flex:1; min-width:220px; max-width:360px; padding:0.6rem 1rem; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius:8px; font-size:0.9rem; background:transparent; color:inherit;">
      <button type="submit" class="m-b" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.5rem; white-space:nowrap;">Subscribe</button>
    </form>
    <div style="margin-top:0.75rem; font-size:0.72rem; color:#86868b;">No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. <a href="/privacy.html" style="color:#81BD4A; text-decoration:underline;">Privacy policy</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="blog-cta" style="padding:4rem 2rem;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 style="font-size:1.5rem;">Stay informed</h2>
    <p>Subscribe to our RSS feed, newsletter, or follow us for the latest articles.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/blog.xml" class="m-b" style="background:#f26522; font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.25rem;"><i class="bi bi-rss me-2"></i>RSS</a>
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#ff6719; font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.25rem;"><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>Substack</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenistsec" target="_blank" class="m-bo" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.6rem 1.25rem;"><i class="bi bi-linkedin me-2"></i>Follow</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
